ZodErrors.invalid_type: The field has an invalid type or is required.
ZodErrors.invalid_string: The field has an invalid format.
ZodErrors.invalid_format: The field has an invalid format.
ZodErrors.invalid_date: The field contains an invalid date.
ZodErrors.invalid_value: The value for field is invalid.
ZodErrors.invalid_literal: The value for field does not match the expected value.
ZodErrors.invalid_union: The field does not match any of the allowed options.
ZodErrors.invalid_intersection_types: The field does not satisfy all combined constraints.
ZodErrors.invalid_enum_value: The value for field is not one of the allowed options.
ZodErrors.too_small: The field does not meet the minimum allowed value or length.
ZodErrors.too_big: The field exceeds the maximum allowed value or length.
ZodErrors.not_multiple_of: The field must be an allowed multiple.
ZodErrors.not_finite: The field must be a finite number.
ZodErrors.invalid_key: The field contains an invalid key.
ZodErrors.invalid_element: The field contains an invalid element.

errors.server: The request could not be completed. Please try again later.
errors.network: Could not connect to the server.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

routeStates.loadingDescription: We are loading the required information.

bulkUploader.reviewDescription: Review the data before sending it to the database.

classrooms.title: Import classrooms
classrooms.description: Upload a CSV file with classrooms. Columns: name, capacity, floor, type.
classrooms.duplicate: The classroom {name} already exists. It will be skipped.

degrees.title: Import degrees
degrees.duplicateCode: The code {code} already exists. It will be skipped.
degrees.duplicateName: The degree {name} already exists. It will be skipped.

itineraries.title: Import itineraries
itineraries.description: Upload a CSV file with itineraries. Columns: degreeCode, code, name.
itineraries.missingDegree: The degree with code "{degreeCode}" does not exist in the organization.
itineraries.duplicate: The itinerary "{code}" already exists in degree {degreeCode}. It will be skipped.

subjects.title: Import subjects
subjects.description: CSV: degreeCode, name, code, availableShifts, courseYear, weeklyHours, numberOfStudents, period, isCommon, itineraryCode. In availableShifts, use a comma-separated list inside the same cell, for example "morning,afternoon".
subjects.missingItineraryCode: Since it is not common, you must provide the itineraryCode.
subjects.missingItinerary: The itinerary does not exist in this degree.
subjects.duplicate: Duplicate subject. It will be skipped.

subjectGroups.title: Import groups
subjectGroups.description: CSV: subjectCode, name, numberOfStudents, weeklyHours, groupType, shift, groupNumber
subjectGroups.duplicate: This group already exists for this subject. It will be skipped.

empty.title: No results
empty.description: There are no items to display right now.

Landing.title: Plan schedules with a clean, fast, and serious interface.
Landing.description: A modern foundation for managing organizations, classrooms, subjects, and users with JWT authentication and a consistent visual experience from end to end.
Landing.panelDescription: Continue along the path that best fits your current state.
Landing.panelNote: The login styling stays consistent across all authentication screens.

centralized.title: Centralized schedule
centralized.description: View and organize time slots, classrooms, and subjects in one place.

secure.title: Secure access
secure.description: JWT, role-based permissions, and a session flow ready to grow with the team.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Built to coordinate organizations, members, and changes without friction.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your account to manage academic scheduling.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Create an account to start managing your schedules.

Profile.title: User Profile
Profile.description: Manage your personal data and application preferences.
Profile.name: Name
Profile.emailDescription: The email address cannot be changed.
Profile.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
Profile.deleteAccountDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
Profile.errorPassword: Could not update the password. Check your current password.
Profile.deleteSuccessDescription: Your account has been deleted successfully. You will be redirected to the home page.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.markAllReadError: Error marking all notifications as read.

page.title: Your organizations
page.description: Select an organization to manage its academic schedules.

dialog.title: New organization
dialog.description: Set up the basic parameters for your organization.

detail.label: Organization details
detail.title: Organization: {organization}
detail.description: Detailed view of the selected organization.

academicYearSummary.description: General control panel and status for academic year {name}
academicYearSummary.activeDescription: The system is operating and generating schedules under this configuration.
academicYearSummary.inactiveDescription: This academic year is currently inactive.

modal.createDescription: Configure the new academic year and its teaching periods.
modal.editDescription: Edit the academic year configuration and grid.
modal.warningDescription: If you edit center opening/closing times, slot duration or break duration, existing schedules may become invalid and need to be regenerated.

opening.title: Initial center limit.
opening.description: No class schedule or reservation can start before this time.

closing.title: Final center limit.
closing.description: No class schedule or reservation can end after this time.

slotDuration.title: Includes the gap between classes if any.
slotDuration.description: If a class lasts 55 minutes and there is a 5 minute gap before the next one, configure the slot as 60 minutes. The long break is defined separately.

errors.invalidDurations: Complete durations with valid numeric values.
errors.invalidForm: Complete the academic year data correctly.

classrooms.label: Classrooms
classrooms.title: Classrooms in {organization}
classrooms.description: List of classrooms available within this organization.

actions.deleteAllDescription: This action will permanently delete all classrooms in the organization.
actions.replaceAllWarning: This action will delete the existing data before importing. Proceed with caution.

classrooms.empty: There are no classrooms registered yet.

degrees.label: Degrees
degrees.title: Degrees in {organization}
degrees.description: List of degrees available within this organization.

actions.deleteAllDescription: This action will permanently delete all degrees in the organization.
actions.replaceAllWarning: This action will delete the existing data before importing. Proceed with caution.

degrees.empty: There are no degrees registered yet.

subjects.label: Subjects
subjects.title: Subjects in {organization}
subjects.description: Full list of all subjects registered in the organization.

actions.deleteAllDescription: This action will permanently delete all subjects in the organization.
actions.replaceAllWarning: This action will delete the existing data before importing. Proceed with caution.

subjects.empty: There are no subjects registered yet.

itineraries.label: Itineraries
itineraries.title: Itineraries in {organization}
itineraries.description: Complete list of all tracks and itineraries in the organization, grouped by their corresponding degree.

actions.deleteAllDescription: This action will permanently delete all itineraries in the organization.
actions.replaceAllWarning: This action will delete the existing data before importing. Proceed with caution.

itineraries.empty: No itineraries have been registered in the organization yet.

subjectGroups.label: Subject groups
subjectGroups.title: Subject groups in {organization}
subjectGroups.description: Groups are organized by subject to preserve the context of each degree.

actions.deleteAllDescription: This action will permanently delete all subject groups in the organization.
actions.replaceAllWarning: This action will delete the existing data before importing. Proceed with caution.

subjectGroups.empty: There are no groups yet. Go to a subject to add groups.

members.label: Members
members.title: Members in {organization}

description.admin: As an admin, you can invite, change roles, and remove members from this organization.
description.viewer: You can review the current organization composition and the roles assigned to each member.

members.empty: There are no members registered yet.

schedules.label: Schedules
schedules.title: Schedules in {organization}
schedules.description: Generate and manage interactive schedules massively or by segment with smart conflict resolution.
schedules.empty: No schedules have been generated for this organization yet.

errors.ERR_ROOM_CAPACITY: The selected classroom does not have enough capacity for this group.
errors.ERR_COMPUTER_LAB_REQUIRED: This group requires a computer lab.
errors.ERR_SHIFT_MORNING: This subject must be taught within the morning shift.
errors.ERR_SHIFT_AFTERNOON: This subject must be taught within the afternoon shift.
errors.ERR_SHIFT_EXCEEDS_DAY: The duration exceeds the maximum allowed hours in the day.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_SINGLE_GROUP: This group is the only one available in its shift and cannot coincide with another.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_DIFFERENT_GROUP_TYPES: Different group types cannot coincide at the same time.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_SAME_SUBJECT: Two groups of the same subject cannot be taught at the same time.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_DUPLICATE_GROUP: The same group appears more than once in this schedule.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_COMMON_ITINERARY: Common subjects cannot overlap with itinerary subjects.
errors.ERR_ROOM_OVERLAP: The classroom is already occupied by another subject at this time.
errors.ERR_BREAK_CROSSING: The class cannot cross the configured break.
errors.ERR_CLASSROOM_REQUIRED_FOR_PLACEMENT: A classroom must be assigned before choosing a day and time.
errors.ERR_SCHEDULE_HAS_CONFLICTS: Cannot publish a schedule with active conflicts.
errors.ERR_SCHEDULE_HAS_UNASSIGNED_SLOTS: Cannot publish a schedule with unassigned slots.
errors.ERR_UNASSIGNED_NO_ROOMS_OF_TYPE: No classrooms of the required type are available in the organization.
errors.ERR_UNASSIGNED_ROOM_CAPACITY: No classroom of the required type has enough capacity for this group ({capacity} students).
errors.ERR_UNASSIGNED_NO_COMPATIBLE_SLOTS: No compatible schedule positions remain because of shift or overlap constraints.

planner.noUnassignedSlots: There are no unassigned slots at the moment. Drag a slot here or click the 'Unassign' button on a slot.

generator.takesAWhile: This action may take a few minutes.

optimizations.classroomConsolidation: Fewer classrooms with more groups instead of more classrooms with fewer groups
optimizations.groupTypeOrder: Order theory, problems, and practical classes
optimizations.subjectDailyDispersion: Spread classes of the same subject across days

import.title: Import schedules
import.description: Copy schedules and time configurations from another academic year into the current one.
import.overwriteWarning: Existing schedules and configurations with the same degree, itinerary, course year, period and shift will be overwritten.
import.overwriteSchedulesTitle: {count, plural, one {Schedule that will be overwritten} other {Schedules that will be overwritten}}
import.overwriteConfigsTitle: {count, plural, one {Configuration that will be overwritten} other {Configurations that will be overwritten}}

form.overwriteWarning: Warning! If generated schedules already exist for these criteria, their slots will be overwritten and you will lose any manual modifications you have made. Are you sure you want to continue?
form.overwriteListTitle: {count, plural, one {Schedule that will be overwritten} other {Schedules that will be overwritten}}
form.missingConfigsDescription: Before generating, configure these combinations. The engine needs the real clock times for every degree, course, period and shift.

grid.unassignedDescription: Drag and drop these slots onto the calendar.

membersManagement.addDescription: Add existing users to {organizationName} and assign their initial role.
membersManagement.readOnlyDescription: Only administrators can add, edit, or remove members.
membersManagement.tableDescription: Review the current members and, if you have permissions, adjust their roles or remove them.
membersManagement.empty: There are no registered members yet.
membersManagement.deleteDescription: You are about to remove {name} from {organizationName}. This action cannot be undone.

message.invalidEmail: You must provide a valid email to add the member.
message.roleUnchanged: The role is already up to date.

slotDurationMinutes.label: Class duration (minutes)
slotDurationMinutes.help: The duration will apply to every generated slot.

warnings.editGrid: Changes to start/end times and slot duration will only take effect for academic years created from now on. To modify existing schedules, you must edit the specific academic year.

empty.title: No organizations yet
empty.description: Once you create an organization, it will appear here so you can open its details.

classroomSchedules.label: Classroom Schedules
classroomSchedules.title: Classroom Schedules
classroomSchedules.description: View and manage all active classroom schedules for your organization.
classroomSchedules.empty: No classroom schedules found matching your criteria.

planner.unassignedSlotsTitle: Classes to be assigned to this classroom
planner.unassignedSlotsEmpty: There are no classes pending to be assigned to this classroom.

classroomReservations.label: Space management
classroomReservations.title: Classroom reservations
classroomReservations.description: Manage organization space requests and reservations.
classroomReservations.cancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation? This action cannot be undone.

newPage.title: New classroom reservation
newPage.description: Select a classroom and click the schedule to request a reservation.

planner.selectClassroomDescription: You must select a classroom to see its available schedule.
planner.reservationDescription: The classroom will be requested for {date} during {time}.
planner.rangeError: The range must stay within the available slot.
planner.ERR_SCHEDULES_NOT_PUBLISHED: Reservations cannot be made until all course schedules are generated and published.

timeConfigs.label: Time configuration
timeConfigs.title: Schedule time configurations
timeConfigs.description: Define the real start and end time for each degree, course, period, shift and itinerary combination.
timeConfigs.empty: There are no possible configurations yet. Create subjects and groups so the system can detect the required combinations.

modal.description: These limits are used to project logical schedule indexes into real clock times.
modal.editConfirmDescription: Changing the time configuration may invalidate schedules and reservations that already depend on it.

editConfirmConsequences.draft: Schedules that depend on this configuration will become drafts and cannot be published until reviewed.
editConfirmConsequences.unassign: Their slots will be unassigned when the time change can make classroom, day or index invalid.
editConfirmConsequences.conflicts: Related conflicts and unassigned metrics will be cleared so they can be recalculated with the new configuration.
editConfirmConsequences.reservations: Future pending or accepted reservations that collide with the change will be cancelled automatically.
editConfirmConsequences.regenerate: Afterwards, you must generate the schedule again so the algorithm can rebuild it.

timeConfigs.error: The configuration could not be saved.
